Generate uniformly spaced sample points in a 1D interval. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em min\+Val} & Lower bound of the interval. \\
\hline
{\em max\+Val} & Upper bound of the interval. \\
\hline
{\em num\+Points} & Number of points to generate (\texorpdfstring{$>$}{>}=2 for valid spacing). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
Vector of uniformly spaced values from {\ttfamily min\+Val} to {\ttfamily max\+Val} (inclusive).
\end{DoxyReturn}
Computes evenly spaced samples using a fixed step size ( (max\+Val -\/ min\+Val) / (num\+Points -\/ 1) ).

{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{GreenFLayered3D_8cpp_a8aa29777c4e70a4d7c032b4c6fb0387d} 
void rgrd2\+\_\+eval\+\_\+c (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{int}]{mx}{, }\item[{int}]{my}{, }\item[{const double \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{x}{, }\item[{const double \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{y}{, }\item[{const double \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{f\+\_\+colmajor}{, }\item[{int}]{m}{, }\item[{int}]{n}{, }\item[{const double \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{xq}{, }\item[{const double \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{yq}{, }\item[{int}]{method}{, }\item[{double \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{fq\+\_\+out}{, }\item[{int \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}}]{ier}{}\end{DoxyParamCaption})}



External REGRIDPACK routine for evaluating a 2D interpolation function. 

Performs 2D interpolation of tabulated data {\ttfamily f\+\_\+colmajor} over a grid defined by {\ttfamily x} and {\ttfamily y}, at query points ( {\ttfamily xq}, {\ttfamily yq} ).


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em mx} & Number of points along the x-\/direction of the input grid. \\
\hline
{\em my} & Number of points along the y-\/direction of the input grid. \\
\hline
{\em x} & Pointer to x-\/coordinates of the input grid (size mx). \\
\hline
{\em y} & Pointer to y-\/coordinates of the input grid (size my). \\
\hline
{\em f\+\_\+colmajor} & Pointer to input function values in column-\/major order (size mx\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}my). \\
\hline
{\em m} & Number of query points along x. \\
\hline
{\em n} & Number of query points along y. \\
\hline
{\em xq} & Pointer to query x-\/coordinates (size m). \\
\hline
{\em yq} & Pointer to query y-\/coordinates (size n). \\
\hline
{\em method} & Interpolation method selector (e.\+g., 0 = bilinear, 1 = bicubic). \\
\hline
{\em fq\+\_\+out} & Output array of interpolated values (size m\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}n). \\
\hline
{\em ier} & Output error flag (0 if successful). \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}

Computes the cross product of a vector with each row or column of a dyad. 


\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em v} & Vector to be crossed. \\
\hline
{\em D} & Dyad (3x3 matrix). \\
\hline
{\em row\+Wise} & If true, apply row-\/wise; if false, column-\/wise. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
Resulting cdyad with cross products applied accordingly. 
\end{DoxyReturn}
